scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Duke says it is guided by the rigor of a candidate's academic program and generally expects students to enroll in five academic courses per year, taking the best available and most challenging courses.
areas.detail: Duke says it is guided by the rigor of a candidate's academic program and generally expects students to enroll in five academic courses per year, taking the best available and most challenging courses.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Duke requires a secondary school report with counselor recommendation and two teacher recommendations.
areas.detail: Duke requires a secondary school report with counselor recommendation and two teacher recommendations.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Duke requires a one-page personal essay and short-answer questions specific to Duke.
areas.detail: Duke requires a one-page personal essay and short-answer questions specific to Duke.
